response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for the English bridge and chorus sections of 'Sip Some Tea'. I have discarded the unused lyrics from the JSON and manually transcribed the preceding Indonesian phrase ('melawan dunia') and subsequent spoken ad-libs ('We'll never give up!', 'Come on guys...', etc.). Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal audio waveforms, with blocks split at audible pauses to ensure precision and semantic continuity.

subtitles.original: As long as we got the strength in ourselves
subtitles.english: As long as we got the strength in ourselves

subtitles.original: We could rise above the pain
subtitles.english: We could rise above the pain

subtitles.original: Giving me what I deserve to have
subtitles.english: Giving me what I deserve to have

subtitles.original: They'll never bring me down, just believe me
subtitles.english: They'll never bring me down, just believe me

subtitles.original: it'll never bring us down, just believe me
subtitles.english: it'll never bring us down, just believe me

subtitles.original: Won't let their cruelty steal my royalty
subtitles.english: Won't let their cruelty steal my royalty

subtitles.original: And when the universe works against me, I will do
subtitles.english: And when the universe works against me, I will do...

subtitles.original: Come on guys, ready to do this?
subtitles.english: Come on guys, ready to do this?
